'''Taug Molou''' was a [[Master Shaper]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their massive [[Yuuzhan Vong War|conquest campaign]] directed against all worlds of the [[Galactic community]]. When the Yuuzhan Vong captured the planet [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] [[26 ABY/Legends|less than a year]] into the war, the [[Shaper caste|Yuuzhan Vong shapers]] immediately descended upon the verdant sphere. Shortly afterward, the invaders turned their attention to the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian natives]], and Master Shaper Taug Molou received orders from [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] to create a tractable slave species on par with the [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Chazrach]], as part of the «Rodia project» – an initiative aimed at developing a new class of obedient soldiers for the Yuuzhan Vong.<ref name="IYV" />

The Master Molou was not willing simply to control the Rodians with [[Yorik-Kul|coral implants]]. He wished to shape a completely new species and was not above straining [[Shaping protocol|religious protocols]] to achieve it.<ref name="IYV" /> In a planetwide project, the Yuuzhan Vong shapers merged Rodian biological material with that of other creatures to create<ref name="NEGAS">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref> monstrosities such as the crab-legged [[Vagh Rodiek]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Thousands of Rodians died in vivisection chambers before the first Vagh Rodiek emerged from its [[birthing blister]]. These former Rodians were nothing more than animals-mindless drones without guidance from their Yuuzhan Vong masters. However, the Molou's beasts did not exist until some time after the fall of Rodia and did not become common until the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|fall of Coruscant]].<ref name="IYV" />
